tools.name: whoami
tools.title: Who am I
tools.description: Return the signed-in SoMA user's profile (id, name, email, avatar).

tools.name: get_user_profile
tools.title: Get user profile
tools.description: Fetch a specific user's public profile by id. Respects RLS.

tools.name: update_my_profile
tools.title: Update my profile
tools.description: Update the signed-in user's profile (full_name, job_title, bio, avatar_url).

tools.name: list_my_teams
tools.title: List my teams
tools.description: List teams the signed-in user belongs to, with their role.

tools.name: get_team
tools.title: Get team
tools.description: Fetch a team's details including the active plan.

tools.name: list_team_members
tools.title: List team members
tools.description: List members of a team with profile and role.

tools.name: list_team_positions
tools.title: List team positions
tools.description: List job positions (cargos) configured for a team.

tools.name: join_team_with_code
tools.title: Join team with access code
tools.description: Join a team using its 20-character access code. The caller is added as a 'requester' (member).

tools.name: get_plan_limits
tools.title: Get plan limits and usage
tools.description: Return current usage vs plan limits for a team (boards, members, demands, services, notes).

tools.name: list_boards
tools.title: List boards
tools.description: List boards the signed-in user has access to (via RLS).

tools.name: get_board
tools.title: Get board
tools.description: Fetch a board with its statuses, services and members.

tools.name: create_board
tools.title: Create board
tools.description: Create a new board with default stages (or custom stages) and optional services and members. Requires team admin or moderator.

tools.name: update_board
tools.title: Update board
tools.description: Update board name, description or monthly_demand_limit. Requires board admin/moderator.

tools.name: archive_board
tools.title: Archive board
tools.description: Archive a board (soft-delete). Requires board admin.

tools.name: delete_board
tools.title: Delete board
tools.description: Permanently delete a board and its cascading data. Requires board admin. Irreversible.

confirm.description: Must be true to confirm irreversible delete.

tools.name: list_board_members
tools.title: List board members
tools.description: List all members of a board with their board role.

tools.name: add_board_member
tools.title: Add board member
tools.description: Add a team member to a board with a given role (admin/moderator/executor/requester). Requires board admin.

tools.name: update_board_member_role
tools.title: Update board member role
tools.description: Change a board member's role. Requires board admin.

tools.name: remove_board_member
tools.title: Remove board member
tools.description: Remove a user from a board. Requires board admin.

tools.name: list_board_statuses
tools.title: List board statuses
tools.description: List active statuses (columns/stages) of a board in order.

tools.name: list_board_services
tools.title: List board services
tools.description: List services attached to a board with their monthly limits.

tools.name: attach_service_to_board
tools.title: Attach service to board
tools.description: Attach a team service to a board with optional monthly_limit (0 = unlimited).

tools.name: detach_service_from_board
tools.title: Detach service from board
tools.description: Remove a service from a board.

tools.name: list_demands
tools.title: List demands
tools.description: Advanced demand listing with filters. Respects RLS.

tools.name: search_demands
tools.title: Search demands
tools.description: Full-text-ish search on title/description of demands (ilike). Supports #123 board sequence.

tools.name: list_my_demands
tools.title: List my demands
tools.description: List demands where the caller is responsible or a follower.

only_primary.description: Only demands where the user is the primary responsible.

tools.name: get_demand
tools.title: Get demand (detailed)
tools.description: Fetch a demand with assignees, subtasks, dependencies and recent comments.

tools.name: create_demand
tools.title: Create demand
tools.description: Create a demand on a board. Defaults: caller as responsible, first active status. Supports followers.

tools.name: create_demand_with_subdemands
tools.title: Create demand with subdemands
tools.description: Create a parent demand plus multiple subdemands and dependencies between them (indices are 1-based within subdemands).

tools.name: update_demand
tools.title: Update demand
tools.description: Update demand fields (title, description, priority, due_date, service_id).

tools.name: change_demand_status
tools.title: Change demand status
tools.description: Move a demand to a new status. Optionally propagates to subdemands.

tools.name: archive_demand
tools.title: Archive demand
tools.description: Archive (soft-delete) or restore a demand.

tools.name: delete_demand
tools.title: Delete demand
tools.description: Permanently delete a demand. Irreversible.

tools.name: move_demand_to_board
tools.title: Move demand to another board
tools.description: Move a demand to a different board. A new board_sequence_number is auto-assigned.

tools.name: list_demand_assignees
tools.title: List demand assignees
tools.description: List the responsible + followers of a demand.

tools.name: add_demand_assignee
tools.title: Add demand assignee
tools.description: Add a follower or set a primary responsible on a demand.

tools.name: set_primary_assignee
tools.title: Set primary assignee
tools.description: Promote a user to primary responsible on a demand (there is always exactly one primary).

tools.name: remove_demand_assignee
tools.title: Remove demand assignee
tools.description: Remove a follower from a demand (cannot leave the demand with 0 assignees).

tools.name: list_demand_dependencies
tools.title: List demand dependencies
tools.description: List demands this demand depends on.

tools.name: add_dependency
tools.title: Add demand dependency
tools.description: Make demand_id depend on depends_on_demand_id (must be delivered before demand_id can start).

tools.name: remove_dependency
tools.title: Remove demand dependency
tools.description: Remove demand dependency.

tools.name: reorder_subdemands
tools.title: Reorder subdemands
tools.description: Reorder subdemands of a parent by supplying the ordered list of ids.

tools.name: list_subtasks
tools.title: List subtasks (checklist)
tools.description: List checklist subtasks of a demand.

tools.name: create_subtask
tools.title: Create subtask
tools.description: Add a checklist item to a demand.

tools.name: toggle_subtask
tools.title: Toggle subtask done
tools.description: Toggle subtask done.

tools.name: update_subtask
tools.title: Update subtask
tools.description: Update subtask.

tools.name: delete_subtask
tools.title: Delete subtask
tools.description: Delete subtask.

tools.name: list_demand_comments
tools.title: List demand comments
tools.description: List chat/comment messages on a demand. Channel 'general' is visible to everyone with access; 'internal' is limited to admin/moderator/executor.

tools.name: post_demand_comment
tools.title: Post demand comment
tools.description: Post a message on a demand. Use [[uuid:Name]] to mention a user (they receive an in-app notification).

tools.name: delete_demand_comment
tools.title: Delete demand comment
tools.description: Delete demand comment.

tools.name: list_demand_attachments
tools.title: List demand attachments
tools.description: List file attachments metadata of a demand. Use `get_attachment_url` to obtain a signed download URL.

tools.name: get_attachment_url
tools.title: Get attachment signed URL
tools.description: Return a short-lived signed URL to download a demand attachment.

tools.name: delete_demand_attachment
tools.title: Delete demand attachment
tools.description: Delete demand attachment.

tools.name: list_projects
tools.title: List projects (folders)
tools.description: List demand folders/projects the caller can access.

tools.name: get_project
tools.title: Get project
tools.description: Get project.

tools.name: create_project
tools.title: Create project
tools.description: Create project.

tools.name: update_project
tools.title: Update project
tools.description: Update project.

tools.name: delete_project
tools.title: Delete project
tools.description: Delete project.

tools.name: add_demand_to_project
tools.title: Add demand to project
tools.description: Add demand to project.

tools.name: remove_demand_from_project
tools.title: Remove demand from project
tools.description: Remove demand from project.

tools.name: list_demand_requests
tools.title: List demand requests
tools.description: List demand approval requests (submitted by requesters) visible to the caller.

tools.name: get_demand_request
tools.title: Get demand request
tools.description: Get demand request.

tools.name: create_demand_request
tools.title: Create demand request
tools.description: Submit a demand request for approval on a team (optionally targeting a board).

tools.name: respond_demand_request
tools.title: Approve/reject/return request
tools.description: Change a demand request status to approved, rejected, or returned. Provide reason for rejected/returned.

tools.name: post_request_comment
tools.title: Post request comment
tools.description: Post request comment.

tools.name: list_notifications
tools.title: List notifications
tools.description: List the caller's in-app notifications.

tools.name: mark_notification_read
tools.title: Mark notification read
tools.description: Mark notification read.

tools.name: mark_all_notifications_read
tools.title: Mark all notifications read
tools.description: Mark all notifications read.
